Ekskludering av mapper vil gjøre dem sammen med deres undermapper, skjulte bare i Simple Gallery. De vil fortsatt være synlige i andre apper.
\n
\nHvis du vil skjule dem fra andre apper også, bruk Skjul-funksjonen.

string.value:
Hvis du har noen mapper som inneholder media, men ikke ble gjenkjent av appen, kan du legge dem til manuelt her.
\n
\nÅ legge til noen elementer her, ekskluderer ikke noen annen mappe.

string.value: For å være sikker på at alle filoperasjoner fungerer pålitelig, gjør denne appen til en mediaadministrasjonsapp i enhetsinnstillingene.

string.value: Something went wrong, please go into your device Settings - Apps - Special app access - Media management apps and allow this app to manage media.

string.value: Alternativt kan du kun tillate tilgang til mediafiler. I dette tilfellet vil du riktignok ikke kunne arbeide med skjulte filer.

string.value: Søk alle filer istedenfor mapper på hovedskjermen

string.name: show_all_folders

string.name: faq_1_title
string.value: How can I make Simple Gallery the default device gallery\?

string.name: faq_1_text
string.value: First you have to find the currently default gallery in the Apps section of your device settings, look for a button that says something like \"Open by default\", click on it, then select \"Clear defaults\". The next time you will try opening an image or video you should see an app picker, where you can select Simple Gallery and make it the default app.

string.name: faq_2_title
string.value: I locked the app with a password, but I forgot it. What can I do\?

string.name: faq_2_text
string.value: You can solve it in 2 ways. You can either reinstall the app, or find the app in your device settings and select \"Clear data\". It will reset all your settings, it will not remove any media files.

string.name: faq_3_title
string.value: How can I make an album always appear at the top\?

string.name: faq_3_text
string.value: You can long press the desired album and select the Pin icon at the actions menu, that will pin it to the top. You can pin multiple folders too, pinned items will be sorted by the default sorting method.

string.name: faq_4_title
string.value: How can I fast forward videos\?

string.name: faq_4_text
string.value: You can do it by double tapping the side of the screen, or tapping the current or max duration texts near the seekbar. If you enable opening videos on a separate screen in the app settings, you can use horizontal gestures too.

string.name: faq_5_title
string.value: What is the difference between hiding and excluding a folder\?

string.name: faq_5_text
string.value: Exclude prevents displaying the folder only in Simple Gallery, while Hide works system-wise and it hides the folder from other galleries too. It works by creating an empty \".nomedia\" file in the given folder, which you can then remove with any file manager too. Note that some devices do not allow hiding folders like Camera, Screenshots and Downloads.

string.name: faq_6_title
string.value: Why do folders with music cover art or stickers show up\?

string.name: faq_6_text
string.value: It can happen that you will see some unusual albums show up. You can easily exclude them by long pressing them and selecting Exclude. In the next dialog you can then select the parent folder, chances are it will prevent the other related albums showing up too.

string.name: faq_7_title
string.value: A folder with images isn't showing up, or it doesn't show all items. What can I do\?

string.name: faq_7_text
string.value: That can have multiple reasons, but solving it is easy. Just go in Settings -> Manage Included Folders, select Plus and navigate to the required folder.

string.name: faq_8_title
string.value: What if I want just a few particular folders visible\?

string.name: faq_8_text
string.value: Adding a folder at the Included Folders doesn't automatically exclude anything. What you can do is go in Settings -> Manage Excluded Folders, exclude the root folder \"/\", then add the desired folders at Settings -> Manage Included Folders. That will make only the selected folders visible, as both excluding and including are recursive and if a folder is both excluded and included, it will show up.

string.name: faq_10_title
string.value: Can I crop images with this app\?

string.name: faq_10_text
string.value: Yes, you can crop images in the editor, by dragging the image corners. You can get to the editor either by long pressing an image thumbnail and selecting Edit, or selecting Edit from the fullscreen view.

string.name: faq_11_title
string.value: Can I somehow group media file thumbnails\?

string.name: faq_11_text
string.value: Sure, just use the \"Group by\" menu item while at the thumbnails view. You can group files by multiple criteria, including Date Taken. If you use the \"Show all folders content\" function you can group them by folders too.

string.name: faq_12_title
string.value: Sorting by Date Taken doesn't seem to work properly, how can I fix it\?

string.name: faq_12_text
string.value: It is most likely caused by the files being copied from somewhere. You can fix it by selecting the file thumbnails and selecting \"Fix Date Taken value\".

string.name: faq_13_title
string.value: I see some color banding on the images. How can I improve the quality\?

string.name: faq_13_text
string.value: The current solution for displaying images works fine in the vast majority of cases, but if you want even better image quality, you can enable the \"Show images in the highest possible quality\" at the app settings, in the \"Deep zoomable images\" section.

string.name: faq_14_title
string.value: I have hidden a file/folder. How can I unhide it\?

string.name: faq_14_text
string.value: You can either press the \"Temporarily show hidden items\" menu item at the main screen, or toggle \"Show hidden items\" in the app settings to see the hidden item. If you want to unhide it, just long press it and select \"Unhide\". Folders are hidden by adding a hidden \".nomedia\" file into them, you can delete the file with any file manager too. Note that hiding works recursively though, so if you hide a folder, all subfolders will become hidden too. So for unhiding the subfolders you have to unhide the parent folder.

string.name: faq_15_title
string.value: Why does the app take up so much space\?

string.name: faq_15_text
string.value: App cache can take up to 250MB, it ensures quicker image loading. If the app is taking up even more space, it is most likely caused by you having items in the Recycle Bin. Those files count to the app size. You can clear the Recycle bin by opening it and deleting all files, or from the app settings. Every file in the Bin is deleted automatically after 30 days.

string.name: faq_16_title
string.value: What happened to file and folder hiding and why cannot I see hidden items anymore\?

string.name: faq_16_text
string.value: Fra og med Android 11 kan du ikke lenger skjule/vise filer eller mapper, du kan heller ikke se de skjulte i galleriapper pga. systemrestriksjoner. Du må bruke en filbehandlingsapp for det.

string.name: faq_16_text_extra
string.value: Or you can also grant this gallery access to All Files through your device settings, that will allow us showing hidden items and make file operations more reliable in general.

string.name: faq_17_title
string.value: Why cannot I include missing folders anymore\?

string.name: faq_17_text
string.value: That stopped working due to the system changes that came with Android 11 too, the app cannot browse real folders anymore, it relies on the so called MediaStore at fetching data.

string.name: faq_18_title
string.value: Why do I see ads during video playback\?

string.name: faq_18_text
string.value: Our apps have no ads whatsoever. If you see them during video playback, you must be using some other apps video player. Try finding your default video player in the device settings, then do a \"Clear defaults\" on it. The next time you invoke some video intent you will see an app picker prompt, where you can select what app you want to use.
